name: Deluxe Roll-Out Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the powdered sugar.
2. Mix thoroughly with butter, egg, and vanilla.
3. Blend in flour and baking soda until a dough forms.
4. Form the dough into a ball and wrap it in plastic wrap.
5. Place the wrapped dough in the freezer for 2 to 3 hours or refrigerate overnight.
6. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
7. Divide the dough into three portions. Refrigerate two portions.
8. Roll out the remaining portion on a floured surface to a thickness of 1/8- to 1/4-inch.
9. Cut into desired shapes and place on a lightly greased cookie sheet.
10. If not frosting, sprinkle with colored sugar.
11. Bake for 6 to 8 minutes if cookies are 1/8-inch thick or 8 to 10 minutes if 1/4-inch thick.
12. Cookies are done when the tops look dry and edges begin to turn light brown; do not overbake.
13. Remove cookies from the baking sheet immediately and let cool on wire racks.
Yield: Approximately 5 dozen cookies, depending on the size of the cookie cutters.
